Pudgy Penguins is quickly becoming one of the most recognized brands on . With collectible stickers, PenguBot, and our official channels, Telegram is becoming an important part of the Pudgy Penguins brand. Here’s what’s going on in case you missed it

If you have a Big or Lil Pudgy, make sure you join Generational Penguins, our holders-only groupchat and your best way to connect with other members of the Huddle! For access, reach out to our community team or type !pfp in the Discord.

For Pudgy Penguins, Telegram is becoming a core hub for community, distribution, culture, collectibles, and onchain experiences all in one place.
